name: C2xSecCertificateGetHandle
title: C2xSecCertificateGetHandle
description: Gets a certificate handle from a certificate listed in the Car2x Certificate Manager.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the certificate as it is given in the Car2x Certificate Manager.

parameters.name: hashedId8
parameters.description: hashedId8 digest of the certificate (e.g. included in the security header of a received frame), size must be 8 bytes. In some protocols this parameter is called certId8.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
